dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, you might be the only person here who doesn't have a stake in this feud. That's exactly why I need you.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Two groups have been at each other's throats for generations over {quest_origin}. The problem is, {target_npc} from one side and a friend from the other have been cooperating in secret. If their groups find out, both will be cast out. I need {quest_item} from {location_hint} to prove that cooperation works, before the {enemy_type} pressing on our borders make the whole argument pointless.
dialogueChunks.outro: If those two get caught before we can show their people there's a better way, we lose the only bridge between them, and the {quest_stakes} will suffer.

dialogueChunks.intro: I need someone who doesn't care about local politics, {player_name}. Someone who judges people by what they do, not where they come from.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: An outsider arrived recently and the people here won't give them the time of day. Wrong background, wrong manners, wrong everything according to the elders. But {target_npc} has been helping them quietly, and now the council is threatening to strip {target_npc} of their standing. If I can gather {quest_item} from {location_hint} and show the council that outsiders bring value, maybe they'll listen.
dialogueChunks.outro: One good deed from a stranger could undo a lifetime of prejudice. But only if we act before the council meets. The {quest_threat} doesn't care about borders, and neither should we.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, have you seen the barrier between our settlement and the one across the ridge? It wasn't always there, and it doesn't need to stay.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Years ago, a dispute over {quest_item} led the elders to build a barrier cutting off the path between the two communities. Families were split apart overnight. {target_npc} has been passing messages through a gap, but guards patrol constantly. If you can find the old passage {location_hint} and clear out the {enemy_type} that have nested in it, we could open a route that no patrol would ever find.
dialogueChunks.outro: People on both sides are waiting for a chance to see each other again. For the {quest_stakes}, all that's missing is a door. {quest_time_pressure}.
